items.caption: A DVD disc features a white center surrounded by blue, purple, and white stripes, with the DVD logo prominently displayed in the center.

A set of three items: two blank dvd cases and a shiny dvd. the dvd cases are standing upright, with the front cover facing the viewer, and the back cover facing away. the dvd case on the left is slightly angled towards the viewer, revealing its spine. the dvd case on the right is positioned straight on, with its front cover fully visible. the shiny dvd is placed on the left side of the image, with its reflective surface catching the light. the background is a plain white, emphasizing the items. there is a watermark text in the bottom right corner that reads "vectorstock" followed by a series of numbers "1005419," indicating the source and reference number of the image.
the dvd player is in the closed cabinet.
a close shot of a hitachi dvd remote control.
a messy computer desk with lots of dvd's.
